Row 18457Cranberry Juice Cocktails Recipes★★★★★
Another one of my favs!! I love cranberry juice, vodka and
lime!!!I used triple sec, regular vodka and the fresh limes!
I didn't have fresh cranberries to float, but it was
delightful,none the less!! Thanks for posting! **Made for
January Beverage Tag 2008**

Row 19447Cranberry Juice Cocktails Recipes☆☆☆☆☆
Cranberry cocktail is probably what is meant by cranberry
juice here since it is in the same quantity meant for
pomegranate juice which is very sweet.

Row 35800Cranberry Juice Cocktails Recipes★★★★★
Great and refreshing! I too added 1/2 bottle of white
